programme.title: E3 - The Guardian Angels Of French Heritage
programme.desc: From Burgundy to the Charente-Maritime, from Mont-Saint-Michel to the Chateau de Rambouillet, ''guardian angels'' work to restore French national heritage. Who are these craftsmen and women, committed to renovating the country's finest monuments and how do they organise their projects, work that is sometimes on a titanic scale?

programme.title: E8 - Artificial Intelligence: A Global Competition
programme.desc: With colossal investments, Americans and Chinese are vying for supremacy in the field of artificial intelligence. programme.title: E126 - The Seven Foods / The Perfect Portrait
programme.desc: The Barbababies think their food can make them change colours and shapes. They decide to find the right food for each of them. // Barbabeau lacks inspiration, he can't create anymore. The whole family helps by suggesting new subjects to paint.

programme.title: E317 - All Star Pups! / Pups Save Sports Day
programme.desc: It's monkey mayhem as pups play kickball against Raimondo's team, until an eagle steals the ball. // The All Star Pups are ready to compete in the summer sports day when Daring Danny X turns the field into an ice rink!

programme.title: E218 - Innovation Melting Pot / Make Up Your Mind Barbazoo
programme.desc: The Barbababies want to invent like Leonardo da Vinci. // The Barbababies must choose between going to the pool or going for a bike ride.

programme.title: E101 - The Crew Builds A Bridge
programme.desc: Rubble and his construction pup family gear up to build a bridge, only to find the villainous Speed Meister has a different idea. It's up to Rubble & Crew to work together and save the day by building a new, safe bridge to Builder Cove.

programme.title: E204 - The Floor Is Guava / We Are The Grumples
programme.desc: Boots wants to enjoy Banana Fest, but the Guava Geyser is erupting! Dora needs to stop the geyser and save the festival. / It's Picture Day, but the Grumpy Old Troll runs away! Dora follows him into Troll World to get him to come out for the picture.

programme.title: E204 - The Floor Is Guava / We Are The Grumples
programme.desc: Boots wants to enjoy Banana Fest, but the Guava Geyser is erupting! Dora needs to stop the geyser and save the festival. / It's Picture Day, but the Grumpy Old Troll runs away! Dora follows him into Troll World to get him to come out for the picture.

programme.title: E420 - Chloe's Big Friends
programme.desc: Peppa and George go to play with Cousin Chloe and her friends, but the older children don't want to play any 'baby' games.

programme.title: E108 - Double Booked
programme.desc: Tim tries to be at two parties at once.

programme.title: E112 - Pups Get A Rubble / Pups Save A Walrus
programme.desc: We see a flashback of how Rubble became a member of the Paw Patrol! // When Wally the Walrus gets tangled in an old fishing net, Ryder and the Paw Patrol need to get him to the surface and back to shore safely.

programme.title: E507 - Pups Save An Underground Chicken
programme.desc: The statue of Chickaletta has been stolen by Mayor Humdinger and is making its way through Adventure Bay's underground tunnel system.

programme.title: E101 - The Crew Builds A Bridge
programme.desc: Rubble and his construction pup family gear up to build a bridge, only to find the villainous Speed Meister has a different idea. It's up to Rubble & Crew to work together and save the day by building a new, safe bridge to Builder Cove.

programme.title: E112 - A Guayabera For Tico / Falling Estrella's
programme.desc: Boots gets a Guayabera shirt as a gift for Tico, but becomes attached to it on the way to Tico's house. // Dora, Boots, and Papi want to see the Quetzal constellation dance across the sky, but it loses three stars! Dora has to get them back in time.

programme.title: E113 - Crabby Boots / Papi's Picnic Party
programme.desc: Dora and Boots meet Shelly, a hermit crab missing her shell, who uses one of Boots' boots. Dora travels across the beach in search of her old shell. // Papi is having a quesadilla picnic, but he forgot the ingredients! Dora sets off to deliver them.

programme.title: E113 - The Crew Builds A Dinosaur Museum / The Crew Builds A Wheelchair Ramp
programme.desc: After uncovering dinosaur bones, the pups decide to build a dinosaur museum! // When Omar the Mail Carrier breaks his foot, it's up to the pups to make sure he can still deliver the mail by building ramps all over town.

programme.title: E106 - Spaceland
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia get lost at a play centre.

programme.title: E106 - It's Only A Mystery... / The Battle
programme.desc: Taking after his favourite detective, Barbabravo looks for a case to solve. Can he solve the mystery of the missing ice statue? // Inspired by their favourite heroes, the Barbababies make costumes. But no heroes are possible without villains...

programme.title: E106 - Spaceland
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia get lost at a play centre.

programme.title: E106 - New Rocket

programme.title: E5 - 楊芸晴變身超腦護航員
programme.desc: 邀請了馬清運、伊能靜、楊芸晴等嘉賓擔任「超腦護航員」；節目根據“八大未來力”的概念來進行項目設置，少年們需要用創造性思維激發想像力，利用從紙筆到程式設計來破解難題，從而喚醒大腦活力，選拔出最具“未來力”的少年。

programme.title: E8 - Big Apple Fireworks

programme.desc: Food festivals are the perfect place to get reviews from new customers, so Duff and Valerie have the bakers create festival-friendly desserts in a jar.

programme.desc: These sweet treats will help tide you over during a long afternoon.

programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin accidentally create a loveable monster that eats their family.

programme.title: The Super Launching
programme.desc: The Super Launching is a geek program in the realm of popular science. Dedicated to showcasing new technologies, achievements, and breakthroughs from around the world, the program focuses on both highlighting existing hot topics and generating new ones, offering the audience a glimpse into the latest popular science and industry developments. Anchored in an innovative city with a global perspective, the Super Launching has established itself as the best platform for global premieres, debuts, and the launch of first stores.

programme.title: News Of Shenzhen
programme.desc: Presented as a leisurely variety show, the program revolves around the theme: 'Seek Paradise Along the Journey to Kunlun Mountain.' Throughout their travels, the adventurers will uncover lesser-known towns, each exuding its own unique charm. They will explore the distinctive characteristics of these hidden gems, savoring every street and lane, as well as every bite and sip. This immersive experience seeks to rediscover the essence of life, allowing our weary hearts to shine anew amidst the dust of daily grind.

NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: We Won't Fight In Vietnam! - US Students And Their Anti-Conscription Protes
programme.desc: The documentary tells the story of American conscientious objectors. The fates of those courageous young Americans who refused to serve in the Vietnam War have been little-documented, until now.

programme.title: Beijing Spring - The Democracy Wall Movement In China
programme.desc: Mao's death was followed by a very short period of freedom of expression in China. Known as the 'Beijing Spring', it was part of the new head of state Deng Xiaoping's desire to distance himself from the mistakes of the Cultural Revolution.

programme.title: E19
programme.desc: Nobunaga hands over the clan to his son Nobutada (Koseki Yuta) and begins building a grand castle in Azuchi with his sights set on unifying the realm. Hideyoshi joins Shibata Katsuie (Yamaguchi Makiya)'s campaign against the Uesugi, but clashes with him over strategy. Meanwhile, Chika falls under suspicion of secret dealings with another warlord. Seeking the truth, Koichiro goes to a village she has been visiting, where he uncovers the painful past she has long kept hidden.

Space Invaders
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts board the rocket ship Tuhura and explore the solar system, learning a little about each of the eight planets along the way.

programme.title: The President (F.W. de Klerk) and The Pioneer (Valerie Amos)
programme.desc: In this episode of Bear Grylls' Becoming Xtraordinary, former President of South Africa and Nobel Peace Prize winner President F.W. de Klerk and first Black woman member of the British Government and pioneering British diplomat Valerie Amos share their life lessons.

programme.title: What's That Smell
programme.desc: Residents of a farming community in the USA have complained about a mysterious, terrible odor! It's up to the MeteoHeroes to find and eliminate the source of the stink. But that's not all. Penguin Peeguu detects a distress call from a group of chickens.

programme.title: What's the Most Psychedelic Vegetable?
programme.desc: A fractal is a pattern that keeps repeating itself at different scales. The Romanesco cauliflower is a great example of a natural fractal. There are a lot of fractals in nature: in ferns, rivers, coastlines, mountains and clouds, for example.

programme.title: Goukamma - A Last Wild
programme.desc: While exploring the picturesque Garden Route, the Zebrabus stumbles onto a hidden retreat with some of the highest vegetated dunes in South Africa. They face snakes and other reptiles before venturing out to sea in search of sharks.

programme.title: Delivery Service
programme.desc: Oto can't wait to see his friends and play trains together! When he arrives, they are already playing a delivery service game, and he is disappointed. The kids' delivery service becomes a real adventure. Oto realizes that combining ideas for different games can be fun.

programme.title: Delivery Service
programme.desc: Oto can't wait to see his friends and play trains together! When he arrives, they are already playing a delivery service game, and he is disappointed. The kids' delivery service becomes a real adventure. Oto realizes that combining ideas for different games can be fun.

programme.title: Super-Rookies
programme.desc: The Triplets have an idea - they want to be superheroes and take over Sprinter's tasks. When they try to catch Cleopatra, they create a bigger problem than a solution.

programme.title: What's the Most Psychedelic Vegetable?
programme.desc: A fractal is a pattern that keeps repeating itself at different scales. The Romanesco cauliflower is a great example of a natural fractal. There are a lot of fractals in nature: in ferns, rivers, coastlines, mountains and clouds, for example.

programme.title: Tricking Your Temperature and Telling Big Lies
programme.desc: The doctors attempt to trick their body temperature and Dr. Chris tries to train his body to beat a lie-detector machine. In the emergency room, one patient has mystery tummy pains and another has cut his leg on his bike.

programme.title: Escaping the Wasp
programme.desc: In the pools of Madagascar, the frog spawn is safe from most predators that can't fly. The wasp, however, wants tadpoles for dinner. When the tadpoles sense the attack they emerge and drop deep into the water.

programme.title: Orange Power
programme.desc: When the battery on Darwin's torch runs out just as he needs it most, he uses the power of oranges to get it working again.

programme.title: The Frog in The Fog
programme.desc: A heavy sea fog rolls in while Darwin and Burpee are on the island, so Newts and Kea need to build a lighthouse to help them navigate the waka home.

programme.title: Delivery Service
programme.desc: Oto can't wait to see his friends and play trains together! When he arrives, they are already playing a delivery service game, and he is disappointed. The kids' delivery service becomes a real adventure. Oto realizes that combining ideas for different games can be fun.

programme.title: The Mystery of the Party Popper
programme.desc: When helium balloons for Tess's fashion show start inexplicably popping, she is upset and asks Addison to help her figure out the cause and stop the rest of the balloons from popping before her show is RUINED!!

programme.title: The Shore
programme.desc: Kit and Mr. Battery break into the lighthouse to find out what it's for.

programme.title: Stinky Shoes
programme.desc: Why do Oto's lucky shoes smell exactly like stinky cheese? If they answer that question, maybe the team can deodorize Oto's smelly shoes and the clubhouse! They head to a stinky cheese festival in Limburger, Belgium, to learn what makes things smell.

programme.title: Ebb the Brave
programme.desc: Ebb and Flo play on the beach a marching game and ‘hide and seek' with Bird. Then they explore a cave but Ebb gets spooked by strange noises and shadows. It's only Bird having fun! Grrr. Back on the beach, Flo leads them off in a marching game.

programme.title: The Metric System
programme.desc: The Metric System is a universal way to measure length, weight, volume, time, electricity and temperature. It is used widely today in countries all over the world, and is also the standard in the science community and is crucial to global industry. But how does it work?

programme.title: E24
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E28
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 痴迷於數學的帥家默偶然發現金華縣一個歷史遺留問題，他在試圖糾正錯誤的過程中頻頻遇阻，並引發了各利益集團間的博弈。 軍戶出身的帥家默對數學極其感興趣，在一次拿各縣賦稅練習數學時，偶然發現有一筆科目叫作“人丁絲絹”稅收數目有疑點。經過查詢，帥家默知道有人偷換概念、移花接木，把原本各縣的賦稅轉嫁給了一個縣。帥家默瞭解此事後決定申訴，但在申訴過程中遇到重重困難，險些喪命，“人丁絲絹案”就此擱淺。後遇改革，舊案重提，經過帥家默和各方努力才讓真相大白於天下。

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 痴迷於數學的帥家默偶然發現金華縣一個歷史遺留問題，他在試圖糾正錯誤的過程中頻頻遇阻，並引發了各利益集團間的博弈。 軍戶出身的帥家默對數學極其感興趣，在一次拿各縣賦稅練習數學時，偶然發現有一筆科目叫作“人丁絲絹”稅收數目有疑點。經過查詢，帥家默知道有人偷換概念、移花接木，把原本各縣的賦稅轉嫁給了一個縣。帥家默瞭解此事後決定申訴，但在申訴過程中遇到重重困難，險些喪命，“人丁絲絹案”就此擱淺。後遇改革，舊案重提，經過帥家默和各方努力才讓真相大白於天下。

programme.title: E28
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E31
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E28
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E28
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 《超時空羅曼史》講述了民國功夫巨星向秦羽，因一場意外來到21世紀，與十八線編劇金阿銀相遇，兩人展開了奇妙浪漫又充滿戲劇性的愛情故事。

programme.title: E536
programme.desc: News Time is meant to put events into historical perspective. The background and history comparison are supplemented with keen observation, critical thinking and interviews, delivering unique insights into trends, thereby casting light on China's future.

programme.title: E473
programme.desc: CULTURAL CANVAS: Cultural Canvas is a flagship cultural program of Phoenix TV deeply beloved by young audiences as their window to engage with and understand traditional culture. Blending 'high culture with popular culture,' the program explores both tangible artifacts and intangible cultural heritage. It tackles major cultural topics with expansive perspectives, interpreting everyday cultural phenomena.

programme.title: E1503
programme.desc: The Great Era gives a wide selection of Phoenix outstanding documentaries, covering different topics and issues in question, and capturing life as it is.

programme.title: E171
programme.desc: GBA Discovery visits the 9+2 cities in the GBA. It provides in-depth coverage of the landmarks, personalities and hotspots in the Greater Bay Area, and leads viewers to experience the prosperity and innovation of the GBA in a holistic manner, as well as the lesser-known stories.

programme.title: E225
programme.desc: CHINA INSIGHT: China Insight is a captivating series that offers foreign hosts the opportunity to travel and observe the dynamic scenes of China's contemporary society. The series aims to showcase the significant transformations taking place in various aspects such as politics, economy, technology, and culture.

programme.title: E224
programme.desc: MY HONG KONG STORY: Each episode of My Hong Kong Story features a Hong Kong native, or those who surround their tale here. Interviewees convey their indigenized story in a personnel aspect. With a 15-minute essence per episode, the cinematic language brings a new perspective to observe Hong Kong for Chinese-speaking audience around the world. Everyone can have an indepth understanding of Hong Kong and its people.

programme.desc: Loic Ballet meets Cantal enthusiasts: Jean-Jacques, the last artisanal gentian distiller, Charly, 94 years old, marathon runner, and Charles, manager of the Mad Cows Festival.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 以日本尚未制度化的臥底誘捕調查為主題，森川葵在劇中飾演的是警視廳新設立小隊「STINGERS（臥底搜查檢證室）」的隊長——二階堂民子。她是警察廳的菁英份子，曾赴美接受 FBI 的正統「Sting Operation（臥底行動）」訓練，身為頂尖精英警視歸國。擅長偽裝、即興演技、心理操控與陷阱設計，是臥底搜查的專家。說話簡潔、指示神秘，經常以出人意表的行動讓部下摸不著頭緒，卻又總能在不知不覺間讓一切線索串連起來。這位充滿謎團的領導者，將帶領 STINGERS 成功解決各種案件。

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 日本最大的財閥集團「加賀美集團」的CEO，也是一位天才發明家，加賀美零隱藏自己的身份，潛入私立絵都學園，成為了一名高中教師。該校的3年0班是一個集合了被認為「無幹勁、無才能、無前途」的學生，被學校其他部分貶低為「零組」。加賀美零將在這樣的環境中，與這些學生共同成長，挑戰教育常規。

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 故事取材自 1984 年的真實經歷，當時三谷寫了一部喜劇小品劇本，準備在澀谷一家脫衣舞劇院的脫衣舞表演間隙表演，以分散來檢查的警察的注意力。

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 日本國稅局「米」課，是令逃稅者聞風喪膽的最終防線。在其內部，新設了一個原創部門——複雜國稅案件處理室「雜國室」。由米田正子（松嶋菜菜子 飾）領軍，集結一群身懷絕技的怪才，專門制裁最棘手難纏的惡德逃稅者，成為體系內獨特而強悍的制裁之刃。

programme.title: Razor
programme.desc: CGTN's brand new science and technology show, covering cutting edge developments from all over the world. RAZOR will show you the world's most powerful laser and the world's smallest anti-cancer treatment. It will take you from the weird world of quantum computing to the boundaries of the cosmos. An international team of reporters will follow the guidance of Occam's Razor - the principle that the simplest explanation is the best one. RAZOR will show that we are already ''living in the future'!

programme.title: Let Me Go
programme.desc: Claudine's life in the countryside is turned upside down when one of her flings decides to stay for her.

programme.title: Rifkin'S Festival
programme.desc: A retired film professor visits a film festival in hopes that a change of scenary can help him finish his novel.

programme.title: MOViE MOViE Home Premieres: Emmanuelle (2024)
programme.desc: A French woman has numerous sensual experiences and crosses path with a mysterious man during a visit to Hong Kong.

programme.title: Emmanuelle (2024)
programme.desc: A French woman has numerous sensual experiences and crosses path with a mysterious man during a visit to Hong Kong.

programme.title: E4 - The Feathering Nest
programme.desc: Successful breeding is critical to the survival of any bird species, and in this episode we meet four species of birds which go to exceptional lengths to find mates and raise their young, giving the next generation the best chance of life. Wherever they live, these birds have got their work cut out, holding their territory against invaders, attracting and winning partners and safeguarding their chicks.

programme.title: E2 - Yukon Wild
programme.desc: The Yukon is a true wilderness, one of the last on Earth. The vast land got its name from its longest river, which the Gwich’in, one of the indigenous people of the region, call 'Yu-kun- ah', or, the 'great river'. The third longest waterway in North America, the Yukon River flows through wide open valleys and narrow channels over 3,000 km Northwest towards the storm tossed Bering Sea.

programme.title: E3 - Waiting for Winter
programme.desc: It’s November at Cape Tatnam. Winter is coming to the lower Western shore of Hudson Bay. But the ice - which should be forming on Hudson Bay by now - is nowhere to be seen. 2016 has been the warmest year on record. In late November, the temperature is 10 degrees warmer than its average. Climate change is wreaking havoc across the North. At just below zero degrees Celsius, the sea cannot freeze.

programme.title: America's Wild Border: Northern Exposure
programme.desc: Trail Atlantic puffins, Prairie rattlesnakes, Alaskan caribou and other animals as they travel across the international boundary between the U.S. and Canada. See how they can move from safety to target by crossing a line they had no say in creating.

programme.title: E4 - Web of Life
programme.desc: A manmade lake in Minneriya National Park supports the largest concentration of elephants in Asia. Follow a young male who has reached a turning point toward adulthood. In the rainforest, jungles teem with a variety of bizarre species of insects.

programme.title: E6 - Life on the Wing
programme.desc: Yala National Park is an avian Eden, home to 215 species of bird. This paradise offers many possibilities for parents who can weather the ever-changing climate. Every species must either raise their offspring here or find a new home before the dry season ends and the monsoon storms begin.

programme.title: America's Wild Border: Northern Exposure
programme.desc: Trail Atlantic puffins, Prairie rattlesnakes, Alaskan caribou and other animals as they travel across the international boundary between the U.S. and Canada. See how they can move from safety to target by crossing a line they had no say in creating.

programme.title: E1 - The Power of Playtime
programme.desc: Explore the ways that animals use play, including young gibbons in Thailand that practice falling from branches, elderly macaques that preserve their brains with playtime, and games that sharpen the profound intelligence of African elephants.

programme.title: E2 - Rules of the Game
programme.desc: Young hyenas compete in tug of war, mischievous parrots play at picking apart tourists’ cars, and Atlantic spotted dolphins enjoy sophisticated social games amid seaweed—all following specific rules that hone social bonds.

programme.title: E19 - Candace And Sean
programme.desc: Sean moved to the East Coast to be with Candace, but living in her bachelorette apartment is becoming cramped. They are searching for a seaside home that accommodates both of their needs.

programme.title: E76 - Orlando: Montcalm
programme.desc: Keith takes the team to see a house in the Wadeview Park neighbourhood that he's been chasing for two years due to probate issues. In Keith's mind, it's been time well-spent because of the low price.

programme.title: E6 - Tuscan Breakfast For Dinner
programme.desc: Rachael makes a decadent Tuscan-style breakfast for dinner using panettone bread to make French toast, which she serves with a prosciutto and melon platter.

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: The four final operators who will run the stores are to be chosen today. Master Yoo Jeong-su and Jeonju Mayor Woo Beom-gi bring their sharp, career-savvy questions to an intense selection process.

programme.title: E20 - Tania And Sundara
programme.desc: Tania and Sundara moved to the East Coast for work and are now looking to find a permanent place to live and expand their family. They want a peaceful place near the ocean to relax and enjoy each other.

programme.title: PREMIER LEAGUE LIVE -LEEDS UNITED vs BRIGHTON & HOVE ALBION[Live]
The Big Brother
programme.desc: Scriptwriter See is a confirmed bachelor. Wai is his devoted butler. Next door is no-good police Ko and his complaining wife Kit. Kit is beautiful and vain. See takes Ko to a macho convention chaired by young and handsome Kar. See gets the highest prize, a beautiful slave girl. She immediately turns the See household upside down. See wants to escape. Ko learns Kit's romance with Kar. He asks See for help. But Kar defeats their every move...

programme.title: Superstars Sunday: Parking Service
programme.desc: Stanley was an optimistic youth, feeling bored in his pig-rearing job, he decided to part with his beloved uncle and aunt and seek for an ideal job to achieve his own goal in life. He then found a job in Tsim Sha Tsui East. There he worked as a member of a parking service team and befriended one of his colleagues Ah Man. Ah Man was a reticent guy who was always frustrated by reality. The problem that he could not afford his sister to further studies in oversea puzzled him now and then. His anxiety was intensified by his sorrowful devotion to a mysterious beautiful girl Stella. Stanley was enthusiastic to help Ah Man to be acquainted with Stella. This made Ah Man live in high spirits. Stanley also encouraged his colleagues to work with enthusiasm. Their team was therefore rewarded with more tips by customers. A member of another team was a man of misconduct who stole spare parts and valuables from customer's cars. Mr. Yang, was a man who made fake banknotes...

programme.title: Tricky Brains
programme.desc: Jing Koo, is hired by Kam to get rid of Chi, to be the manager of the company. But he finds himself being cheated. He regains his confidence and competes with the 'King of Tricks'...

programme.desc: The Bosun makes a difficult choice that angers one of the deckhands. A romance that was getting serious starts to take a turn. A group of hot charter guests come aboard and one of the stews is smitten. Tensions on the deck team spill over and cause meltdowns.

programme.title: E4 - Tough Divisions
programme.desc: A group of young, entitled guests continue to cause chaos for the crew. The chef pulls together an over-the-top eight-course tasting menu that totally rocks and when the primary demands a late-night swim, it lands him and the crew in murky waters. Two deckhands have become a liability and Capt. Sandy and Nathan must figure out what to do about it.

programme.title: E1005 - One False Move / Personal Train Wreck
programme.desc: The Loud kids and their cousins come up with a plan to convince Lance and Sharon to move their family to Royal Woods. // When Lynn gets the opportunity to be a trainer at her uncle's gym, she struggles to motivate her out of shape clients.

programme.title: E102 - Sad, Single, and Stranded / A Waste of a Perfect Summer Day
programme.desc: Will & Min show Jack around to help him find a good story. Lily spills boba in Jack's suitcase and tries to hide the evidence. // Jack tries to find 'the big picture' as Lily shows him how to spend a perfect summer day in Canyon Valley.

programme.title: E1003 - Spy Dames / Cupid's Harrow
programme.desc: During Grandparent's Day at Lincoln's school, he and Myrtle face off with a spy nemesis from Myrtle's past. // Leni accidentally causes trouble for Lori and Bobby while taking calls on her and Miguel's dating podcast.

programme.title: E526 - Appetite for Destruction / Frame on You
programme.desc: When Lily starts misbehaving at home, Mom and Dad think her new preschool friends might be the cause. // When Rusty is wrongfully suspended, the Action News Team leaps into action to clear his name.

programme.desc: Lola and her nemesis, Lindsey Sweetwater, join forces to uncover a mystery while competing at a pageant.

programme.desc: Graduated from college and realizing it takes more than just a cappella to get by, the Bellas return to make music together one last time.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: When a dangerous crime wave hits the beach, the squad of lifeguards go on a mission to prove that you don’t have to wear a badge to save the bay.

programme.title: Save The Last Dance
programme.desc: A small-town girl with big dreams must face the biggest challenge of her life – to stay true to her dream and her new romance.

programme.title: Fantastic Beasts: The Secrets Of Dumbledore
programme.desc: Professor Albus Dumbledore knows the powerful Dark wizard Gellert Grindelwald is moving to seize control of the wizarding world.

programme.desc: Professor Albus Dumbledore knows the powerful Dark wizard Gellert Grindelwald is moving to seize control of the wizarding world.

programme.title: E32 - Brain Grub
programme.desc: Mung thinks that Chowder is scatterbrained so he gives him a special type of food called Brain Grub, making him very smart.

programme.title: E1 - The Arborians
programme.desc: Chowder and the gang must get syrup for a recipe.

programme.title: E11 - Michael's Santa Monica
programme.desc: Tom makes his final decision from Last Chance Kitchen on who should return to the competition. Then the chefs take off in a Quickfire with Padma and Jonathan Waxman making a two-course Business-Class dish for an airline. For their final challenge in Los Angeles before jetting off to Italy for the finale, the chefs go to Michael’s Santa Monica, where they meet Chef and Restaurateur Michael McCarty, the legendary pioneer of California Cuisine. With only five chefs moving onto the finals, the chefs will have to reimagine one of Michael’s iconic dishes from across the years and serve it to a table of celebrated alumni of Michael’s kitchen, including Roy Yamaguchi, Jonathan Waxman, Sang Yoon, Mark Peel and Brooke Williamson.

programme.title: Superman
programme.desc: A Superman who's driven by compassion and an inherent belief in the goodness of humankind.

programme.title: E21 - Big Robot On Campus
programme.desc: When all the Westley Kids but Philly Phil get invited to a popular kid's party Philly Phil becomes determined to figure out exactly what it is about popular kid behavior that he doesn't grasp. The data he compiles on the subject he then uses to build a robot he calls BROC (Big Robot on Campus) which he endows with all the sure-fire popularity attributes he can think of thus making it possible for Philly Phil to ride into popularity on BROC's coattails. Surprisingly Philly Phil's plan seems to work... that is until things start backfiring when BROC begins treating Philly Phil as a social liability and starts scoring popularity points at Philly Phil's expense.

programme.title: E24 - Vote Sunny
programme.desc: Adventures with music superstar Sunny Bridges and his class.

programme.title: E12 - Creature Feature
programme.desc: After Max dozes off before a double feature, Ben and Gwen are left to save the drive-in on their own when evil magician Hex brings the film monster 'that'to life and unleashes it on the cinemagoers.

programme.title: E16 - Assault On Pancake Palace
programme.desc: When Gwen enters a pancake-eating contest at the world-famous Pancake Palace, Ben spots the Bugg Brothers and must stop them before they obtain an endless supply of what fuels their creations.

programme.title: E4 - Schooled by a Girl Scout
programme.desc: When a 13-year-old girl scout needs help earning a primitive camping skills badge, Bear Grylls flies to the rescue… literally. Beth’s wisdom for life and the outdoors is beyond her years, but nothing can prepare her for what challenges bear has in store for this adventure.

programme.title: E7 - Frozen Planet
programme.desc: The contestants are helicoptered to the top of a glacier, where they must navigate unforgiving terrain and dangerous crevasses. With high altitudes and fewer resources, the tasks become more demanding. Divided, the four remaining teams compete for a spot in the final journey.

programme.title: E3 - Manila
programme.desc: Getting around this city is like navigating a bee hive...except the bees are driving cars, trucks and trikes!

programme.title: E1 - Highlight 1
programme.desc: A 44-ton Artic straddling the central reservation of the M1 is a rush hour headache for Crouch Recovery Incident Manager Steve and one of the youngest Recovery Ops on the team, Pat. Down South, Lantern Recovery op Steve rescues a broken down 26-ton dustcart from a busy London street. Crouch Recovery op Jim gets drenched as he risks life and limb trying to get a broken-down tractor back to its farm – just a hundred yards away! And Lantern’s night shift recovery op Jason faces a battle to rescue an articulated lorry that’s crashed down a steep ditch off the A1.

programme.title: E2 - Highlight 2
programme.desc: An overturned Gas tanker full of highly flammable propane mean trouble for Crouch Recovery Incident Manager Steve. Working with the fire service he must all his experience to keep his team out of danger. Meanwhile with very little room to manoeuvre Lantern recovery op Steve must rescue a 44-ton artic stuck in a ditch on a busy five lane roundabout. And Lantern Recovery Op Sean has thought on his feet to break into an abandoned truck!

programme.title: E7 - Frozen Planet

programme.title: E2 - The Whole Crew to the Rescue!
programme.desc: It's the whole crew to the rescue in these amazing adventures! When Kat doesn't know a car's throttle is stuck, she goes for a test drive & is soon out of control, forcing Grandma & Gecko to rescue her! Then, when a beach trip is cancelled because Tilly the Tow Truck breaks down, Trevor helps with a tow & then delivers a load of sand to create a surprise beach right at the garage! Plus, the whole crew jumps into action when Blue gets stranded alone down a steep bank.

programme.title: E3 - A Big Ocean Clean Up Day!
programme.desc: Join the Shark Family as they work hard to keep the sea clean! It's a busy day with so much rubbish on the seabed. Stanley Shark becomes his heroic alter-ego, Super Shark, to show everyone how to clean up & recycle properly! The Sharksons show their creativity by using recycled materials to build an amazing underwater ball pit & slide. Plus, see them use teamwork to operate little digger trucks & even fix a broken bus wheel using a sunken bin lid!

programme.title: E2 - The Whole Crew to the Rescue!

programme.title: E5 - An Adventure, Pedals, Rescue & Stars!
programme.desc: Join the Minibods for an adventure with pedals, rescues & stars! Lulu goes camping but realizes she's left her favorite Binky Bunny behind & has to learn how to cope. Then, Newt goes on an adventure to find a real-life Flutterbug, but she has to be brave when her bike's stabilizers come off! The adventures continue as Jeff overcomes his fear of mud to rescue his feather duster & Bubbles builds a rocket to try & reach a big purple star in the sky!

programme.title: E3 - A Big Ocean Clean Up Day!

programme.title: E2 - Let's Sing Our Favorite Classic Songs!
programme.desc: Come sing your favorite classic songs with Kii & Yii! The sing-along starts on Old MacDonald's farm, where the friends learn how to spell the friendly dog's name in the song 'Bingo'! Then, listen as Mr. Cat sings a story about his grand adventure visiting the Queen in her palace. The fun continues with the story of the Lion & the Unicorn, the flying adventure of 'Two Little Dicky Birds' & a song about the Old Woman Who Lived in a Shoe.

programme.title: Fist Of Stardom

programme.title: Rob N Roll
programme.desc: Two perplexed middle-aged losers, Robby and Fai are good friends. Fai is honest man. His wife left him with an elderly home business. Fai has tried very hard to keep it running until the owner increases the rent crustily. Taxi driver Robby, who is timid and unreliable, he always neglected the conflicts between his mother and his wife. Robby always lives paycheck to paycheck without a financial plan, so he is at a loss what to do. There are two robberies involving the money exchange stores just across the street encourages Robby and Fai to get a gun and rob the same. It is a destiny to meet the ruthless bandit Mui, who acts wicked, scheming and chivalrous.

programme.title: E4 - Romania
programme.desc: Joanna heads towards the Danube Delta, one of the last great wilderness areas remaining in Europe, full of birdlife including the majestic Pelican. At the mouth of the river, on Romania's Black Sea coast, Joanna bids farewell to the Danube and reflects on her amazing journey.
